scenario.key_phrase: I've been watching Alakh sir's videos and want to join

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Sahil?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this is Sahil! I've been watching Alakh sir's videos and I'm really interested in joining PW. His teaching style is amazing!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful to hear! Alakh sir has helped lakhs of students achieve their dreams. Tell me, which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 12 right now. I've been following PW for a while and I'm super excited about the structured courses you offer.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Class 12 is such an important year. Which competitive exam are you preparing for - JEE or NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm preparing for NEET. I want to become a doctor and I know PW has excellent NEET courses. Can you tell me more about them?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! We have fantastic NEET courses. When is your NEET exam? Is it in 2025 or are you planning for 2026?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: My NEET exam is in May 2025, so I have about 7 months left. I know it's getting close but I'm very motivated to work hard!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: 7 months is actually a good amount of time with focused preparation! For NEET 2025, I'd recommend our NEET Yakeen 2027 batch - wait, sorry, for your timeline, we have specialized crash courses. What's your current preparation level?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I've covered most of the syllabus through school and self-study, but I need structured revision and practice. I've heard great things about PW's test series and doubt clearing sessions.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, our test series is really comprehensive! We have NEET Yakeen 2027 which is ₹33,999 with complete study material, live classes, and test series. But since your exam is in 7 months, let me check what specialized batches we have.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹33,999 sounds reasonable for all that content! But will this batch be suitable for my timeline? I don't want to waste time on basic concepts I already know.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! The Yakeen batch has advanced modules perfect for revision phase. Plus, you get lifetime access, so even if you need to reappear, you're covered. What's your budget range, if you don't mind me asking?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Budget is not a major concern for me. My parents are very supportive. I just want the best preparation possible. Can I make this decision today itself?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's amazing that you have such supportive parents and decision-making authority! The NEET Yakeen batch includes live classes by Alakh sir and top faculty, detailed study material, and weekly tests. We also offer EMI at ₹3299/month through PW Pay.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: This sounds perfect! I love that Alakh sir will be teaching. What exactly is included in the study material? And how many mock tests are there?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You get comprehensive notes for Physics, Chemistry, and Biology, previous year question papers, and over 100+ mock tests with detailed solutions. Plus 24/7 doubt clearing support through the app.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Wow, 100+ mock tests! That's exactly what I need for practice. And the doubt clearing feature sounds great. How do I enroll? Can we complete the process right now?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! I can help you enroll right now. You can pay the full amount ₹33,999 or choose EMI of ₹3299/month. Which option would you prefer?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I think I'll go with the full payment option. My parents already gave me permission to invest in good coaching. What's the next step?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll send you the payment link right after this call. Once payment is done, you'll get immediate access to the course on PW app. You'll also receive a welcome email with all course details. Ready to start your NEET journey with us?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, I'm absolutely ready! This is so exciting. I can't wait to start studying with Alakh sir's structured approach. Thank you so much for explaining everything clearly!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Thank you Sahil! I'm so happy we could help you today. You'll receive the payment link in 2 minutes, and our student support team will call you once enrollment is complete. Best of luck for your NEET preparation!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you Priya! I really appreciate your help. Looking forward to starting my PW journey. Have a great day!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You too Sahil! Welcome to the PW family. See you in the classes soon!
